title: Hilton Beach Experience Video
details: This promotional video for Hilton Colombo highlights an exclusive beach experience at Port City, designed for guests seeking leisure and adventure beyond the hotel setting. Featuring activities such as ATV rides, kayaking, and beach club experiences, the film adopts a handheld, dynamic visual approach to convey a sense of spontaneity and movement. The narrative contrasts stillness with high-energy moments, positioning the experience as a vibrant extension of Hilton’s luxury hospitality offering in Sri Lanka.

title: Shangri La Easter High Tea Video
details: A refined visual narrative for Shangri-La Colombo’s Easter High Tea, capturing the artistry of preparation and the quiet indulgence of a sunset dining experience at Sapphire Lounge.

title: Shang Palace Guest Chef Brent Guo Video
details: A cinematic feature on Guest Chef Brent Guo QuanQuan at Shang Palace, highlighting the precision, tradition, and artistry behind authentic dim sum through both curated dining and an intimate masterclass experience.

title: Women’s Day Fashion High Tea Coverage
details: A dynamic glimpse into Shangri-La Colombo’s Women’s Day celebration, where fashion, conversation, and high tea come together in an atmosphere of elegance and energy.

title: City of Dreams Spice Restaurant
details: A cinematic portrayal of Spice 8 at City of Dreams Sri Lanka, where bold Asian flavours, curated cocktails, and nightlife energy converge into a refined, immersive dining experience.

title: Hilton Emperor’s Wok
details: A festive campaign film for Hilton Colombo’s Emperor’s Wok, capturing the richness of Chinese New Year through indulgent dim sum, curated menus, and a celebratory dining atmosphere.

title: Shangri- La Valentines Day Promotion Video
details: A romantic campaign film for Shangri-La Colombo, capturing intimate moments, atmosphere, and the quiet luxury of a thoughtfully curated Valentine’s Day experience.

title: Hilton Sunset Blu Promotional Video
details: A vibrant promotional film for Hilton Colombo’s Sunset Blu, capturing the shift from golden hour calm to a lively poolside social experience shaped by music, movement, and shared moments.

title: Kuredhivaru Resort and Spa New Year Eve Film 2026
details: A cinematic New Year’s Eve film for Kuredhivaru Resort & Spa Maldives, capturing an immersive, nature-inspired celebration shaped by rhythm, connection, and the spirit of the ocean.

title: Kuredhivaru Teaser Film
details: A teaser film for Kuredhivaru Resort & Spa Maldives, capturing the warmth, atmosphere, and quiet anticipation of a festive season shaped by nature, light, and island rhythm.

title: Latitude 5.5 Pool Party
details: This promotional film for Kuredhivaru Resort & Spa Maldives showcases a lively pool party experience at Latitude 5.5, combining music, cocktails, grilled cuisine, and social interaction in a tropical setting. The film emphasizes energy, crowd dynamics, and daytime atmosphere, positioning the event as a signature leisure experience within the resort’s lifestyle offering.

title: Gala Dinner Kuredhivaru
details: A refined gala dinner film at Kuredhivaru Resort & Spa Maldives, capturing a festive evening where curated cuisine, live performances, and oceanfront ambiance come together in a seamless dining experience.

title: Christmas Cocktail Party
details: This film for Kuredhivaru Resort & Spa Maldives captures a Christmas cocktail party set along the beach, featuring a themed arrival, social interaction, and a vibrant festive atmosphere. Blending elements of event storytelling and lifestyle cinematography, the piece highlights cocktails, guest engagement, and the resort’s approach to seasonal experiences in a tropical setting.

title: Santa’s Arrival Promotional Film
details: This promotional film for Kuredhivaru Resort & Spa Maldives presents a festive island experience through the narrative of Santa’s arrival. Moving across daytime and evening settings, the film captures food, cocktails, atmosphere, and guest interaction, positioning the resort as a dynamic destination for seasonal celebrations. The piece blends storytelling with lifestyle visuals to convey the full spectrum of the festive offering.

title: City Of Dreams Nuwa Christmas High Tea
details: A quiet, intimate film set within City of Dreams Sri Lanka’s Christmas High Tea, capturing a couple’s shared moment through atmosphere, detail, and subtle festive warmth.

title: City Of Dreams Casino
details: A sleek promotional film for City of Dreams Sri Lanka’s Level 06 Casino, capturing the sense of arrival, anticipation, and elevated entertainment through atmosphere, movement, and controlled energy.

title: City Of Dreams Dragon Suite
details: A visual exploration of the Dragon Suite, where layout, detail, and atmosphere define a sense of privacy, scale, and elevated living.

title: Sapphire Dragon A Festive Narrative
details: A narrative-driven festive film for Sapphire Dragon at Cinnamon Life, where a wandering Santa leads into a Christmas experience shaped by atmosphere, flavour, and an Eastern-inspired dining setting.

title: A Christmas Feast at Cinnamon Life
details: A festive campaign film for Cinnamon Life, following a character-led journey through a curated dining experience where flavour, setting, and atmosphere come together in a refined Christmas narrative.

title: Christmas buffet Quizine Cinnamon Life
details: A visual exploration of a festive buffet at Cinnamon Life, where abundance, detail, and atmosphere come together to shape a rich and immersive dining experience.

title: Festive Desserts Shangri- La
details: This promotional film for Shangri-La Colombo focuses on festive desserts, highlighting pastry craftsmanship, detail, and presentation. Through close-up cinematography and controlled pacing, the film emphasizes texture, form, and visual appeal, positioning the offering as a refined and indulgent part of the hotel’s seasonal dining experience.

title: The Perfect Pour — Cinnamon Life
details: A playful, beverage-led campaign film for Cinnamon Life, capturing cocktails, wine, and festive spirits through a character-driven narrative and a refined lifestyle approach.

title: Santa’s Stay — Cinnamon Life
details: A character-led hospitality film for Cinnamon Life, capturing a quiet moment of rest and reflection within a room defined by comfort, warmth, and city-facing atmosphere.

title: 50 days to Christmas
details: A campaign opening film for Cinnamon Life, introducing the festive season through atmosphere, anticipation, and a narrative-driven sense of arrival.

title: The Vault COD
details: A refined nightlife film for The Vault at Nüwa, City of Dreams Sri Lanka, capturing an atmosphere defined by craft, detail, and a quiet sense of exclusivity.

title: The World of Wine
details: A retail-focused film for Wines by VS, capturing the store’s curated selection, spatial identity, and the diversity of its wine offering through a clean, cinematic approach.

title: Capital Bar & Grill - Elevated Experience
details: A lifestyle-driven film for Capital Bar & Grill at Shangri-La Colombo, capturing the dining experience through a guest-led perspective where presentation, atmosphere, and subtle moments define the setting.

title: Behind the Apron- Chef’s Day Video
details: A process-driven film following a chef’s day at City of Dreams Nüwa, capturing the rhythm, precision, and human moments behind the craft of cooking.

title: Taste of Shangri- La
details: This promotional film for Shangri-La Colombo presents “Taste of Shangri-La” through a parallel narrative featuring chefs from Capital Bar & Grill and Shang Palace. The film highlights contrasting culinary styles while maintaining a unified standard of precision and quality, using rhythm and composition to connect both kitchens into a single visual experience.

title: Women Behind the Bar
details: A performance-driven bar film for Capital Bar & Grill at Shangri-La Colombo, highlighting two female bartenders through rhythm, precision, and presence — redefining the space through craft and confidence.

title: The Craft of Bread Shangri-La Colombo
From Kitchen to Table Shang Palace
details: A culinary film for Shang Palace, following the transition from kitchen craft to table presentation — where precision and detail culminate in a refined Yum Cha experience.

title: An Easter Creation Shangri-La Colombo
details: A delicate study of creation and surprise — where a master chef shapes a chocolate Easter egg, concealing a hidden message within its final form.

title: ITC Islander Food Preparation
details: A pre-launch culinary film for Islander at ITC Ratnadipa, capturing the preparation, process, and rhythm behind a seafood restaurant before its first service.

title: ITC Islander Food Preparation
details: A pre-launch culinary film for Islander at ITC Ratnadipa, capturing the preparation, process, and rhythm behind a seafood restaurant before its first service.

title: The Atmosphere — Islander
details: This promotional film for Islander at ITC Ratnadipa focuses on the restaurant’s ambiance, highlighting interior design, lighting, and its coastal setting. The film emphasizes atmosphere and spatial experience, positioning the venue as a distinctive seafood dining destination.

title: Islander Launch Film
details: This launch film for Islander at ITC Ratnadipa presents a complete seafood dining narrative, beginning with sourcing ingredients from coastal regions and local markets, followed by preparation, cooking, and final service. The film integrates environment, culinary process, and guest experience, positioning the restaurant as an authentic and refined seafood destination.

title: The Takeover — Aki Nakata at CBG
details: A takeover film featuring Aki Nakata at Shangri-La Colombo, capturing a guest bartender’s presence through precision, movement, and a focused approach to mixology.

title: The Connect — Shangri-La Colombo
details: A lifestyle-driven film for The Connect at Shangri-La Colombo, following a day shaped by focus, movement, and routine within a contemporary co-working environment.
